textPlain: I can't imagine a girl falling into a deep coding obsession.You could say that girls are saner. Or you could say that boy insanity is different from girl insanity.
This is a real vibe shift kind of article, remember circa 2018 Hacker News?
My female cousins did learn how to load and play games on their Commodore 128, but of course that fell by the wayside when they got an NES.It was a lot easier to get a game going on the NES.
